author: tobiasosborne
text:
Session 32 clean-room reimplementation decomposed this into 7 sub-issues:

BUGS (root causes):
- TGR-6l7 [P1]: simplify merges terms into d(bilinear) breaking kernel extraction
- TGR-9ab [P1]: to_fourier uniform-k wrong signs for asymmetric derivatives
- TGR-om8 [P2]: HANDOFF documents wrong formula (use h^{ab}d1G_{ab} not d2R+cross)

TASKS (fixes):
- TGR-lnj [P1]: Integrate extract_kernel_v2 (depends on TGR-6l7, TGR-9ab)
- TGR-7fj [P2]: Document/test -2 sign convention for R^2/Ric^2 (depends on TGR-lnj)
- TGR-3sd [P3]: Add field kwarg to to_fourier (depends on TGR-lnj)
- TGR-ogo [P3]: Clean up HANDOFF/WIP code (depends on all above)

The correct pipeline verified by clean-room: K_EH = extract_kernel_v2(h^{ab}d1G_{ab}) with phase (-1)^{n/2+n_R}. Gives FP ground truth (2.5, 0, -1.0, 0).
